question: At what second mark does the segment begin where the bald man reaches for the safe dial? A. 12 B. 14 C. 16 D. 18
How many whiskers are described on each side of the black cartoon cat's muzzle?
What is the primary color of the small cartoon cat seen in the room? A. White B. Black C. Dark D. Light-colored
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A bald man with a white beard and a small black cat stand in a room containing a large telescope and a space poster. The man looks through the telescope eyepiece while the cat sits on the floor observing. The man opens a large metal safe labeled SAFE. Both the man and cat hold a round money bag with a dollar sign near the open safe door.

question: How many characters are visible in the scene where the black cartoon cat holds a white sack?

Which of the previously seen objects is back on screen in the final clips? A. bald man with a large nose wearing a dark suit jacket B. large white telescope with black dots mounted on a stand C. large rectangular metal safe with a heavy door D. small white sack tied at the top with a string

Did the video feature BOTH a large telescope AND a metal safe? A. Only a large telescope was featured B. Only a metal safe was featured C. Both a large telescope and a metal safe were featured D. Neither a large telescope nor a metal safe was featured
Where is the large telescope positioned in the room during the scenes with the bearded man? A. On the right side B. On the floor C. Next to the man D. Inside the safe
Where is the bald man located relative to the safe when it first appears? A. In the background B. To the right C. To the left D. On the floor
What action is the character with the white beard performing? A. standing B. sitting C. gesturing D. opening
Describe the sequence of interactions with the telescope and safe as they appear in the video.
canonical_answer: At 6s, the man bends forward to look through the telescope eyepiece; at 8s, the bearded character raises his right hand and points his index finger upward; at 14s, the man reaches his hand out to touch the dial of the safe; at 16s, the man opens the door of the safe and leans inside; at 18s, the black cat and the bald man are both holding a round money bag.

question: Has the man with the white beard started looking through the telescope yet?

Why does the man point his index finger upward? A. A black cat entered the scene walking B. He previously looked through the telescope eyepiece C. He stood next to a large metal safe D. He gestured towards a small character wearing a pointed hat
